reference_answer: Verify the Critical alarm on Nokia-Core-Delhi-NCR-1. Because it is a Core Router, its failure will cascade to all connected Provider Edge nodes in the Delhi-NCR region. Run diagnostic commands to check routing protocols and apply the resolution steps.

reference_answer: For an alarm on Ericsson-PE-Mumbai-MH-2, check the PE router logs. If it fails, only the local Access Switches connected to it in the Mumbai-MH region are affected. Follow the diagnostic and resolution commands provided.
